input_rmsnorm.summary: RMSNorm evidence is the initial cast, square, mean, eps-add, rsqrt, and weight multiply sequence.

qkv_projection.summary: Q/K/V evidence is three hidden-size linear projections followed by view/transpose head split.

rope.summary: RoPE evidence is cos/sin index+unsqueeze, rotate-half slice/neg/cat, then multiply/add.

attention.summary: Attention evidence is q @ k^T, scale/div, mask add, softmax, and dropout over q_len x kv_len scores.

attention_output.summary: Attention-output evidence is attn @ V, transpose/reshape, output projection, and residual add.

mlp.summary: MLP evidence is post-attention RMSNorm, gate/up linear, SiLU, gated product, down linear, residual add.
